title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 23 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 23 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 23 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/08/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked and keep upward all the day.The main contract closed at 705,increased of 2.47 %. Traders are no moremotivated to ship. Steel mills are more mainly on the sidelines, and market turnover continues to pick up.PBF at Shandong port dealt 733-750 uan/mt,increase 5-15 yuan/mt than yesterday.
